 # $FreeBSD$
-#

-PORTVERSION=	0.1.9

 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
 MAINTAINER=	clsung@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Rubygem for Simply builds and verifies OAuth headers
 
+LICENSE=	MIT
+
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
 RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
